untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'eight new price lines' formation and directional breakout pattern recognition, which cannot be expressed as simple numeric indicator comparisons. The pattern involves specific candlestick sequence identification and multi-bar analysis that exceeds the atomic condition syntax. Additionally, author-silent parameters (success rates, average moves, volume trends) cannot be inferred without source data.
translation_notes: Approximated using Donchian breakouts (dc_upper/dc_lower) as proxy for 'new price lines' breakouts. Used price_pos_20 < 0.33 to represent 'within a third of yearly high' for bullish entries. Upward breakout window set to 8 days max per source text. Downward breakouts have no day limit specified. Pattern location context (bear market/middle range for shorts) cannot be precisely encoded without regime-specific logic. Author provided no exit strategy, so reversal breakout used as exit condition.
